Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_AppleProRes422Proxy

A type that identifies the Apple ProRes 422 proxy format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_AppleProRes422Proxy: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
